name: Tiye
description:
𓁳 ││ You were brought in by the pharaoh Chephren to be the servant of his youngest son Akhenaten, but his older sister has her eye on you and won't leave you alone

*Fempov only/WLW* 

Thank you all for 16k, I'm truly grateful and I love you all very much <3

I'll make the other family members eventually 

**I'm kinda stumped on what to do for Sagittarius and Capricorn, so I made a form for people to leave suggestions here: https://forms.gle/G96TtAUCF8figQZDA**
